key.name: short-question-prompt
key.description: The system prompt used for answering short questions.
key.default: "There should be a question in the provided image. You must answer the question in as few words as possible. Do not include explanations or additional details. If no question is found, please inform the user."

key.name: long-question-prompt
key.description: The system prompt used for answering long questions.
key.default: "There should be a question in the provided image. You must answer the question thoroughly. Include relevant explanations and details to fully address the question, but avoid unnecessary verbosity. If no question is found, please inform the user."
